title: Building Local-First Financial Tools
excerpt: In an era where every transaction runs through a cloud server, we decided to take a step back and build LocalBudget completely differently. Let's delve into why we chose a strictly local architecture, the challenges we faced, and the immense privacy benefits it affords to our users.

title: The Metaphysics Computing Manifesto
excerpt: What does 'Metaphysics Computing' mean? It represents a commitment to software that transcends mere utility to become an elegant extension of the human mind. Here are the core principles that guide our development...
